scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Medium Fish Feed Mill of Production Capacity of 8 Ton/Day
page_title: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Medium Fish Feed Mill of Production Capacity of 8 Ton/Day

details: The “Medium Fish Feed Mill of Production Capacity of 8 Ton/Day” is a scheme component under the Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY), implemented by the Fisheries Department, Government of Haryana. This is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme, aims to promote fish feed self-sufficiency and affordability among fish farmers. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided for setting up medium-sized fish feed mills with a production capacity of 8 tons per day, benefiting entrepreneurs and fish farmers.
benefits: Financial assistance for setting up a fish feed mill of 8 tons/day capacity.
40% subsidy of the project cost for General Category beneficiaries (up to ₹40,00,000/-).
60% subsidy of the project cost for Weaker sections/ SC/ST/Women and their co-operatives of beneficiaries (up to ₹60,00,000/-).
eligibility: The applicant should be a resident of Haryana.
The applicant should possess a valid Parivar Pehchan Patra (Family ID).
The applicant should ensure that the medium fish feed mill is in working condition.
The applicant should ensure the feed produced from the unit is supplied at affordable price to fishers and farmers.
The fish feed mill should be on land owned by the applicant or on a long-term registered lease (minimum of 10 years).

online: For registration, click on “New User/Register Here” and fill in all the mandatory details i.e. Name, Email ID, Mobile Number & password. Click on ‘Submit’.
Verify the OTP received in the provided Email and Mobile Number. Alternatively, click on the Verification Link to activate the profile.
Login to Apply for the Scheme:
The “Sign in here” option is available on the right side of the screen. Fill in the required credentials and click on the ‘Login’ button.
In the opened window, click on “Scheme/Services list” and a list of schemes will appear on the screen.
Now, select the scheme and click on “Apply for Service/Scheme”.
Fill in all the details in the online application form and click on "Submit".
Type SARAL and send to 9954699899 to track your application.
Type SARAL<space><Application ID/Ticket No.> and send to 9954699899 to track your application/ticket.
The applicant must submit certified invoices with GST compliance for all items purchased. Bills over ₹50,000 must comply with e-Way Bill, Income Tax, and GST rules.
The applicant must provide a CA (Chartered Accountant) certificate confirming tax-compliant payment of invoices.

documents_required: Birth Certificate (Voter Card/Date of Birth Certificate/Aadhaar Card/Class 10
Caste Certificate (Caste certificate issued by a First-Class Magistrate (Tehsildar/SDM))
Agreement Letter-1 (Agreement letter between the beneficiary and the department)
Fisheries Training Certificate of the Applicant (related to the fish feed mill)
Land Records (Land records from the Tehsil (land registry, copy of Aksasra/Fard/Registered Lease Deed) and the land title should be clear, along with the latest land registry/Fard/Aksasra)
Photograph of the beneficiary with the fish feed mill
Bank account and PAN card details
Detailed Project Report (DPR) / Self-Contained Proposal (SCP) as per the guidelines issued under the Centrally Sponsored Scheme PMMSY (Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana)
Bills Exceeding ₹50,000/- (the grant application must be accompanied by e-way bills/Income Tax/GST as per rules)

Certificate from a Chartered Accountant (CA) with the bills submitted with the grant application, certifying that the payments for the goods purchased by the beneficiary have been made as per Income Tax/GST rules.
CLU (Change of Land Use) / NOC (No Objection Certificate) / Pollution / Fire certificates must be obtained from the concerned department.
NOC from the Gram Sabha/MC (Municipal Committee)/Authority of the area where the unit is located
A clear site plan/area site plan should be attached with the case

faqs.question: Who is eligible for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Permanent residents of Haryana with valid Family ID and a fish feed mill DPR/SCP.

faqs.question: What is the production capacity supported under the scheme?
faqs.answer: The production capacity is 8 tons per day.

faqs.question: What is the maximum subsidy under the scheme?
faqs.answer: ₹60,00,000/- for ST/SC/Women and ₹40,00,000/- for the General Category.

faqs.question: Is the subsidy centrally sponsored?
faqs.answer: Yes, under the Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY).

faqs.question: Do I need to own the land?
faqs.answer: Not necessarily. A registered lease agreement of at least 10 years is acceptable.

faqs.question: What documents prove land possession?
faqs.answer: Jamabandi, Fard, Nakal, or Registered Lease Agreement.

faqs.question: Is there any fee to apply?
